prompt: A young adult East Asian woman sitting on a light beige fabric sofa, indoor lifestyle portrait photography. She has a slender and long figure, long straight dark brown-black hair flowing naturally, smooth hair volume, side-parted, delicate and soft facial features, clear features, light makeup, fair and delicate skin but retaining real pores and slight texture. She wears a loose pure white short-sleeved T-shirt and dark grey lounge shorts with lace-up details on both sides of the shorts, barefoot. The pose should be highly consistent with the reference image: she sits diagonally on the sofa, legs naturally crossed and bent, one calf extending forward, the other tucked in; one arm raised back, hand naturally supporting the back of the head or behind the ear, leaning against the sofa back; the other hand naturally hanging down near the knee. Head slightly lowered and turned toward the bottom left of the frame, eyes looking down quietly, expression calm, relaxed, slightly pensive, not looking at the camera. The background is a full wall of deep grey curtains with a strong drape, soft warm indoor light spilling out from the back right, creating a slight warm light atmosphere; the overall space is quiet, simple, like a luxury hotel or modern apartment living room. The light is mainly soft diffused light, with natural and delicate transitions on the person's face and legs, restrained highlights, and soft shadows. The overall color tone is low saturation, low contrast, dominated by beige, grey, white, and warm brown, the image is clean and high-end. Photography style: real photography, no illustration feel, no AI plastic skin; full body to upper body composition, slight white space, 85mm lens effect, shallow depth of field, focus clearly on the person's face and upper body, realistic texture of sofa and curtains, realistic skin quality, photo-level realism, high-end lifestyle photography, quiet and private atmosphere. Avoid: cartoonish feel, excessive skin smoothing, CG feel, wrong fingers, extra limbs, deformed legs, facial distortion, exaggerated makeup, over-sharpening, overexposure, cluttered background, text, watermarks, logos.

promptZh: 一位 年轻东亚女性 坐在 浅米色布艺沙发 上，室内生活方式肖像摄影。她身材修长，深棕黑色长直发自然垂落，发量蓬松，侧分，五官精致柔和，轮廓清晰，淡妆，皮肤白皙细腻但保留了真实的毛孔和微小纹理。她身穿 宽松的纯白色短袖 T 恤和深灰色休闲短裤，短裤两侧带有系带细节，赤脚。姿势需与参考图高度一致：她斜坐在沙发上，双腿自然交叉弯曲，一只小腿向前延伸，另一只向内收；一只手臂向后抬起，手自然支撑在脑后或耳后，倚靠在沙发靠背上；另一只手自然垂在膝盖附近。头部微低并转向画面左下方，双眼安静地向下看，表情平静、放松、略带沉思，不看镜头。背景是一整面深灰色垂感极佳的窗帘，柔和的暖色室内光从右后方洒入，营造出淡淡的暖光氛围；整体空间安静、简约，如同豪华酒店或现代公寓的客厅。光线以柔和的漫射光为主，人物面部和腿部过渡自然细腻，高光克制，阴影柔和。整体色调低饱和度、低对比度，以米色、灰色、白色和暖棕色为主，画面干净高级。摄影风格：真实摄影，无插画感，无 AI 塑料皮肤；全身至半身构图，留白适度，85mm 镜头效果，浅景深，焦点清晰地落在人物面部和上半身，沙发和窗帘质感真实，皮肤质感真实，照片级写实，高端生活方式摄影，安静私密的氛围。避免：卡通感、过度磨皮、CG 感、手指错误、多余肢体、腿部变形、面部扭曲、夸张妆容、过度锐化、过度曝光、背景杂乱、文字、水印、Logo。
